matched.name: Academia
matched.description: Academia is a classroom designed for schools and colleges. The layout supports organized day-to-day storage and easier access to essentials.

overview_sections.heading: Smart Storage & Stability for Learning
overview_sections.body: Academia is a thoughtfully designed classroom desk that prioritizes functionality and long-lasting durability. Its high-quality MDF tabletop provides a sturdy, reliable surface suited for everyday academic use.
With integrated, practical storage solutions, Academia blends style with utility effortlessly. Its clean, modern design makes it an ideal choice for contemporary learning environments.
Ergonomically contoured back handle allows easy lifting and repositioning of the chair, enabling quick, effortless classroom rearrangements without strain.
Integrated wire-mesh under-desk storage offers ample space for books and bags while keeping the desktop clear and the classroom neatly organized.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.
